title: Three men dead after west London building fire
description: Blaze broke out in single-storey pavilion in New Zealand Way in White City on Saturday evening
content:
Three people have died after a fire at a building in London, the London fire brigade (LFB) has said.
The fire service said it received reports of the blaze in New Zealand Way in White City, west London, at 6.52pm on Saturday.

title: King Charles to publish personal tax bill in first for UK head of state
description: Buckingham Palace says move is intended to increase ‘clarity and accessibility’ of monarchy’s finances
content:
King Charles will become the first head of state to reveal their personal tax bill in what the palace said was an attempt to enhance the transparency of royal finances.

title: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again as Israel continues to strike Lebanon
description: President Donald Trump, in response, threatened to impose US tolls in the crucial waterway if a final deal with Iran isn’t reached in 60 days. | ITV National News
content:
The White House insists the strait is still open - but will any ships risk it? Philip Sime reports.
Iran says it's closed the Strait of Hormuz again as Israel continues to strike Lebanon, despite a ceasefire being agreed on Friday.

title: World Cup 2026: Germany 2-1 Ivory Coast - Deniz Undav scores 94th-minute winner in Group E clash
description: Match report as Germany reach the World Cup knockout stages with a late 2-1 win over Ivory Coast in Group E; Deniz Undav scored twice from the bench with his winner coming in the 94th minute; Franck Kessie opened the scoring for Ivory Coast
content:
Deniz Undav's 94th-minute goal clinched a come-from-behind 2-1 victory for Germany against Ivory Coast in Group E to send them into the World Cup knockout stages.

title: Edinburgh attack suspect appears motivated by ‘anti-Muslim hatred’, PM says
description: A video appeared to show a topless man on the ground shouting that he is "protecting the country" as he is held by an officer. | ITV National News
content:
The Prime Minister has condemned the attacks in Edinburgh that have left five people injured, saying the suspect appeared to be motivated by "anti-Muslim hatred".
